scope.description: Post-remediation hook surface review. Validate Phase 029 commits 9810ad65d + 19eb09c3c + scan-findings remediation a663cbe78.
focus_areas: Post-remediation hook surface correctness across Claude, Codex, Copilot, Gemini, OpenCode
OpenCode plugin bridge opencodeTransport contract + parseTransportPlan parity
Codex advisor hook native-first dispatch + SPECKIT_CODEX_HOOK_TIMEOUT_MS extension + stale-advisory fallback vs silent fail-open
Codex PreToolUse bashDenylist + bash_denylist alias coverage, toolInput casing, bare git reset --hard default, read-only-hook ADR-006 compliance
Codex hook-policy detector removal of codex hooks list probe + Superset TUI env scrub + .codex/settings.json presence detection
Copilot sessionStart routing through repo-local wrapper with preserved Superset fan-out
Runtime hook matrix doc parity (prompt vs lifecycle split)
context-prime claim removal + session_bootstrap documentation alignment
Cross-child dependency integrity between 001/002/003 phases and Phase 029 commits (9810ad65d + 19eb09c3c)
